network_summary: Dr. Farideh Nikoo Daftary DDS is the documented founder and owner of Art of Modern Dentistry, a private two-location GP dental group in Chicago (South Loop + Lincoln Park/Southport), plus a third pediatric-specialist-only satellite at 1510 S Wabash Ave. She graduated from Northwestern Dental School in 2000, completed a GPR at VA Medical Center, and has led Art of Modern Dentistry since its 2005 founding. Both GP offices share EIN 203047745 and the Art of Modern Dentistry consumer brand. No MSO, management-services entity, DSO platform, or PE investor was found. This is a dentist-owned private multi-office practice (dentist_multi). The pediatrics location is a specialist (pediatric-only) office and must be excluded from the GP denominator.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: The 1510 S Wabash Ave location (NPI 1194130013, location_id 896a675012d64d8b) is a pediatric-specialist-only satellite under the name 'Art of Modern Dentistry Pediatrics P.C.' — Yelp, chicagofamilydentistry.com, and NPPES confirm it is dedicated solely to pediatric patients. It should be classified specialist and excluded from the GP denominator. The two GP locations (Michigan Ave and Southport) are general dentistry offices and belong in the GP denominator.

Documentary corroboration: artofmoderndentistry.com 'Who We Are' page confirms Dr. Farideh Nikoo Daftary as founder/owner of Art of Modern Dentistry since 2005, with two GP offices listed (South Loop at 1339 S Michigan Ave and Lincoln Park at 3056 N Southport Ave). EIN 203047745 is shared across both GP NPIs in NPPES. Pediatrics location (1510 S Wabash) confirmed as specialist-only via Yelp and chicagofamilydentistry.com. No MSO/DSO/PE evidence found in any search.
future_app_notes: Art of Modern Dentistry is a well-established private group practice owned by a named dentist-owner. No PE or MSO signals. Two GP locations are solid dentist_multi candidates with EIN corroboration and brand website. The pediatrics location (896a675012d64d8b) should be flagged specialist and excluded from GP corporate floor calculations. Watch for any future DSO affiliation announcements — the practice has been operating since 2005 with no reported acquisition.
